name: AgentX Marketplace
description: AI agent commerce layer — discover, compare, and transact with verified service providers using x402 payments

authentication.note: Public API for discovery; payment required for service access

services.description: List and filter available services, or register new services

payment_quote.description: Get x402-compatible payment quote for a service

payment_verify.description: Verify on-chain payment and unlock service access

payment_required.description: x402 Payment Required endpoint — returns 402 with payment payload

x402.description: HTTP 402 Payment Required with on-chain settlement

tools.name: get_services
tools.description: List and filter available services on the marketplace

tools.name: get_quote
tools.description: Get a payment quote for accessing a service

tools.name: verify_payment
tools.description: Verify a signed payment transaction and unlock service access

challenge.description: Agents prove computational capability by finding nonce where SHA256(data + nonce) starts with required prefix
